programme.desc: (R) This unique documentary series celebrates the flavourful, and often unknown dishes made by talented cooks in the slums of Manila, Bangkok, Mumbai, Jakarta, Phnom Penh and Kota Kinabalu. Using cheap and overlooked ingredients, they cook up scrumptious dishes that are famous within the slums.

programme.title: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: (R) Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

The two stubborn people collide with each other and the contradictions are overwhelming. However, they grow up in each other's strengths and gradually fall in love.

programme.title: The Way To Happiness
programme.desc: With their disparities in wealth and social status, the two brothers of the Gao family and their children find their own ways navigating through the ups and downs of life to find their own happiness.

programme.title: Cash On Delivery
programme.desc: (R) Grandma dies. Everyone tries to get a distraught Juncong to pull himself together. Weizhong's mother comes from Malaysia to reunite with Weizhong and Jialiang. Raj and Xiaohuan decide to keep the baby. Meizhen and Yunyun take over grandma's pastry stall. Juncong works with the others to deliver meals to seniors in rental flats. Things improve when vaccines are available. A new norm begins.

programme.title: Hello Singapore
programme.desc: (Live) Delivering the day's latest news and social features that matter to you. Every Monday to Friday, from 6.30pm to 7.30pm on Channel 8.

programme.title: My One And Only
programme.desc: May continues to be an illegal bookie, to Zhongyi's dismay. Zola breaks her promise to promote Haojian's company after her house is done up. A furious Haojian ridicules Zola during his act. Mr Quek turns up at his flat to chase Xiaofang out. Baoyou stands up for her. When Defu asks Baoyou why she cares so much about Xiaofang, she reveals that she used to be a victim of bullying.

programme.title: Hear U Out
programme.desc: Ruby Lin became a household name after starring as Ziwei in the popular drama "My Fair Princess". But who would have known that her role was almost replaced because of her looks? Since her debut, Ruby Lin has played the female lead in several dramas. How did she become a film producer later?

programme.title: I Do, Do I?
programme.desc: To surprise Yumi, Leonardo works with the others to propose to Yumi publicly. However, Jingsheng discovers the plan and opposes it. Due to Johan's busy schedule, Fon gets lost on her way to meet a friend and is unable to receive help. She feels very out of place and misses home. To receive Jingsheng's blessing, Leonardo and Yumi visit him, but he scares Leonardo away with a durian.

programme.title: Detective L

programme.title: New Life Begins
programme.desc: Young ladies gather in the kingdom of Xin Chuan because of the royal marriage selection. Li Wei, who just wants to work hard and not get selected, finds herself involved with Yin Zheng, the sixth young master of Xin Chuan. They accidentally get together and start a new life with many different situations.

programme.title: The Long Ballad
programme.desc: (R) She Er finds out about everything his mother did. In the guise of letting the Eagle Army cooperate with Yicheng, Ashina Sun devises a plan to save the Great Khan. Out of anger, Yicheng plans to execute Ashina Sun as a warning for everyone who tries to betray her.

programme.title: The Legend And The Hero
programme.desc: (R) King Yue of the Zhou kingdom is smitten with the Lady Da Ji and wants her as his consort, he sent out his army to punish Da Ji's father when the latter resisted. Da Ji has no choice but to concede. King Yue's incompetence and lecherous ways attracted the attention of Shen Gong Bao, who instigated the fox spirit to enter the body of Da Ji in order to control the king. The kingdom of Zhou is hence thrown into disarray as evil spirits rule the court...

programme.title: Ah Ma Can Cook
programme.desc: (R) Host Kym Ng pairs up with Bryan Wong to learn how to make traditional rice dumplings from 68-year-old Ah Ma Mdm Koh. Mdm Koh has been making at least 200 dumplings per year, since the tender age of 5! It was also during the long, hard hours in the family kitchen that her own love for cooking grew. Can the duo master Ah Ma's recipe successfully?

programme.title: Tekan Minyak
programme.desc: Tekan Minyak is a story that revolves around 5 women who call themselves The Havana Girls. Each of them have their own episodes but they are bonded by the thread of friendship which is held by Zuraidah, the oldest of them. They all started their friendship when they were young from a religious class and after a short separation, they all unite back and the incidents that happen will be core of Drivers.

programme.title: Jurnal Joey
programme.desc: Joey witnesses a bullying incident and conveniently jumps into his own conclusions. He decides to post the bullying video without checking the truth. His actions causes a boy to be shunned by his friends. Watch the unexpected turn of events and how Joey found a new best friend.

programme.title: Kualinari
programme.desc: A pair of good friends Aman and Zack faces this week's challenge with Chef Khaled in making a traditional malay kuih, Nagasari, and Indian cuisine, Chapati and Keema from scratch.

programme.title: Tanya Doktor
programme.desc: Different from the previous seasons of Tanya Doktor, we are pushing the envelope with a new conversational approach which there would be an interaction between viewers and the expert coming from the medical background.

programme.title: Snip and Snappy!
programme.desc: When the eccentric owner and fun loving otai hairdresser Linda rents out half her shop space to the young Parisian-trained Andy hair stylist, she didn't realize her tenant will be the polar opposite of her. Can both divas get along? Besides the conflict, through the interaction with the close-knit community, the drama explores themes and issues close to their hearts.

programme.title: Merentas Samudera ke Nusantara
programme.desc: Experienced lawyer Zainal Ariffin Ismail together with experts in the fields of archaeology, history, and ethnomusic act as Historical Detectives uncovering evidence of the arrival of Islam and its development in Peninsula Malaysia guided by epigraphy, artifacts, oral history, and music.

programme.title: Muzika Ekstravaganza 2023
programme.desc: Muzika Ekstravaganza is a collaboration between the national broadcasters of Singapore and Malaysia, Radio Television Malaysia (RTM) and Mediacorp Suria. Muzika Ekstravaganza returns this year as part of the ongoing efforts to strengthen the bilateral relations between Singapore and Malaysia. In addition, this collaboration could spawn more opportunities for artistes from Mediacorp and RTM to work together to create innovative content and quality broadcasts.

programme.title: Sekali Aku Bahagia
programme.desc: Muaz is a worker in a market owned by Naufal. While working there, Aireen, Naufal's younger sister, is attracted to and falls in love with Muaz without knowing he is already married. Muaz has kept his marital status a secret to keep his work. They eventually get married without Muaz's first wife, Rania's knowledge. One day, Aireen found that Muaz's first wife had just given birth to a baby named Delisha. Naufal is very protective of Aireen and decides to separate Muaz and Rania.

programme.title: Tanam Apa Tu Bang Aji
programme.desc: A retiree named Abang Aji starts getting into gardening to get active as advised by a doctor. As Abang Aji's free time is now occupied, his wife Cik Ja gets to focus on her business without interruptions from Abang Aji. But, Cik Ja grows suspicious when she notices that Abang Aji starts getting close with a widow which then escalates into a marriage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Blue and small, standing only three apples high, the Smurfs might be hard to tell apart at first. However, each Smurf is a distinct individual with his or her own personality, their names say it all!

programme.title: Kualinari
programme.desc: A pair of good friends, Jannah and Rusydina takes up this week's cooking challenge by Chef Andri. Join them as they learn and try to make Terung Balado and the traditional Vietnamese Springroll as demonstrated by Chef Andri.

programme.title: Hilang
programme.desc: Due to modernisation, many traditional games were eclipsed and lost.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu 2021
programme.desc: A talk show with the concept of Warung in a village where stall owners are so interested in the stories of celebrities present.Together with Jep, Shuib, Rahim and Pak Ya, they will interview the guests present where guests should share their stories and life experiences throughout being artists. In addition, there are also special guests who will appear at the end of the program.

programme.title: Cinta Round 1
programme.desc: Farid is a nerdy guy who always been bullied by Syakirin, his senior. Farid is determined to enter an MMA tournament organized by their university so to put an end to being bullied by Syakirin.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Korban
programme.desc: A determined sous-chef, Aisyah is at her crossroads after the death of her mum, Tania. Will her signature dish earn her a place in the New Zealand restaurant so she can be closer with her Maori fiance, Ari or remain in Singapore to reconnect with her estranged father, Rahim? How far will she sacrifice for love?

programme.desc: Piala Suara Serumpun celebrates its 15th anniversary. Moments away from the competition, the organiser, Serumpun DK SG shares the trials and tribulations of the competition. As the teams take to stage, they share about their preparation, feelings and performance.

programme.title: Gotong-Royong
programme.desc: In attempting to host a sports day event for the students of MIJ Hub, Muslims with Muscles are having difficulties as they lack experience. With coaches from the Eastern Rebels Rugby Group, will the team be able to carry out their plan successfully?

programme.title: Putri Mahkota
programme.desc: Rania begins her employment at the workplace where Mr Hanif is based. Meanwhile, Mr Hanif's friend takes the initiative to meet with Narah, seeking to gather more information and investigate the circumstances surrounding the tragic death of his son.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu
programme.desc: A talk show with the concept of Warung in a village where stall owners are so interested in the stories of celebrities present.Together with Jep, Shuib, Rahim and Pak Ya, they will interview the guests present where guests should share their stories and life experiences throughout being artists. In addition, there are also special guests who will appear at the end of the program.

programme.title: Aku Raja Lawak
programme.desc: Since childhood, Silah has Big dream to become a famous comedian. His son Faris believe of his father's talent and wants him to fulfil his dream. Unfortunately Silah's mother in law is against it and wants him to have a better career than being a comedian. Things becomes more complicated when Silah found out that his son is sick and needs huge amount of money for his surgery. To raise money for him, he decide to join Raja Lawak competition.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge
programme.desc: (Dual Language - English and Malay) A legend of legends, Valt Aoi hosts an exhibition match featuring a revolutionary class of Bey: "Lightning Beys". Inspired by the battle, two unknown brothers, Hyuga and Hikaru Hizashi, issue a challenge: armed with their solar Beys Hyperion and Helios, this unlikely duo is going to topple Beyblade's ruling elite.

programme.title: Janji Sedap
programme.desc: Join our chef as he takes you to a culinary journey and learn how to whip up vibrant and flavoursome cuisine.

programme.title: Single Terlalu Lama
programme.desc: Andy is determined to look for Jasmine, but Eman suggests that he should find ways to forget her instead and move on.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Manja
programme.desc: What are the problems faced by men? Let's discuss together in BOLEH BUAL. Follow Isk as he explores the natural beauty of Jeju Island, South Korea in BOLEH PERGI. Also, Fatin tries the art of glass-blowing in BOLEH CUBA.

programme.title: Bunga dan Kayu
programme.desc: Bunga, a 25-year-old woman who works at a hotel has a dream to be an actress, but her father protests it. After sneaking off to an audition in KL, Bunga rushes home and gets into a car accident and an argument with a man named Noah. One day, Bunga is tasked by her boss to personally serve a VIP guest throughout his stay at the hotel. The VIP guest turns out to be Noah - a troubled famous actor. Bunga, who had been told to always be by Noah's side, finds that Noah has left her sights.
